name: Platinum Group Metals Ltd.
description: Platinum Group Metals Ltd. is a Canadian mining company focused on the exploration and development of platinum and palladium properties in South Africa and Canada. The company's flagship asset is the Waterberg Project, a large-scale underground deposit located on the Northern Limb of the Bushveld Complex in South Africa. Platinum Group Metals is the operator of the Waterberg Project and is working with partners such as Impala Platinum and Hanwa Co. Ltd. to advance the project toward production. The company is also involved in the development of next-generation battery technology through its investment in Lion Battery Technologies Inc.
